scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && git add VERSION && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(cat VERSION)" && git tag v$(cat VERSION)
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && git add VERSION && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(cat VERSION)" && git tag v$(cat VERSION)
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && git add VERSION && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(cat VERSION)" && git tag v$(cat VERSION)
scripts.release:patch: npm run version:patch && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run version:minor && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm run version:major && git push origin main --tags
